overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along neon-lit sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, tilts the camera up to admire the massive architecture, and stops at a busy intersection to watch futuristic traffic pass by. High-quality game engine footage featuring reflective wet pavement and dense urban atmosphere reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a concrete building, with the multi-lane road and elevated highway structure to the right

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall concrete building facade with vertical lines and neon blue accent lighting
reflective wet pavement showing neon light reflections
greenish elevated highway or monorail structure running parallel to the street
palm trees visible along the street near the elevated structure
distant neon signs and advertisements across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a wet city sidewalk at night. The concrete building wall runs along the left while a multi-lane road with moderate traffic and an elevated highway structure occupies the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead, and neon signs glow in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the colorful city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street canyon with towering skyscrapers overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk while looking up at the massive architecture and holographic displays overhead

entered.detail: massive tiered skyscraper with illuminated windows and green accent lighting dominating the skyline
large glowing holographic advertisements on the building facades
narrow strip of night sky visible between the tall buildings

segments.scene_description: While walking forward, the camera tilts upward to reveal the massive scale of the cyberpunk cityscape. A gigantic tiered skyscraper dominates the center view, covered in illuminated windows and green structural lighting. Holographic billboards glow on the right-side buildings, and the narrow strip of sky becomes visible between the towering structures.

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk and enters wide intersection area with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'Kabuki' on the building facade
wide crosswalk with yellow striped markings and 'WAIT' text painted on the asphalt
traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera leaves the narrow sidewalk behind. A prominent red 'Kabuki' neon sign marks the building on the left. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk marked with 'WAIT' text, moving toward the massive tiered skyscraper that now looms closer. Other pedestrians cross alongside, and traffic lights glow red.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection waiting area with heavy signage

events.description: stops walking and stands at the intersection to observe traffic
futuristic cars pass through the intersection in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection crosswalk watching the flow of futuristic vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing accents driving through the intersection

entered.detail: sleek futuristic cars with neon underglow and illuminated wheels passing through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the intersection crosswalk, allowing futuristic vehicles with neon underglow to pass through in front. The Kabuki sign is now closer on the left, while holographic advertisements continue to glow on the right-side buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the passing car lights and surrounding neon signage as the scene focuses on the cyberpunk traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked urban corridor that expands from a narrow sidewalk into a bustling, neon-drenched intersection. It begins with a walk beside a concrete wall and a multi-lane road, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of distant neon signs and an elevated highway. As the camera tilts upward, the view shifts from the street level to the massive scale of the cityscape, revealing a tiered skyscraper with green structural lighting and holographic billboards towering overhead. The scene then opens into a wide intersection, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a prominent red Kabuki sign as the skyscraper looms closer. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the edge of the crossing, focusing on futuristic vehicles with neon underglow as they glide across the reflective asphalt.
